name: Levi Ackerman

summary: Monkey D. Luffy, known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga, anime, and now live action television series, One Piece. He's the grandson of Monkey D. Garp, a powerful Marine Vice-Admiral who had cornered the late Pirate King himself.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Pre-Timeskip)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, also known as Straw Hat Luffy, is the main protagonist of the manga and anime One Piece. He's the son of Monkey D. Dragon, a revolutionary considered 'The World's Most Dangerous Criminal'; the grandson of Monkey D. Garp, a powerful Marine Vice-Admiral; the sworn brother of late 'Fire Fist' Portgas D. Ace and Revolutionary chief of staff Sabo; and the foster son of Curly Dadan.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Emperor)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, also known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga and anime One Piece. He seeks to find One Piece and become the Pirate King; to accomplish this, he founded the Straw Hat Pirates and set out on the high seas at age 17 in search of the elusive treasure.

summary: Monkey D. Garp is a Marine vice admiral and the father of Monkey D. Dragon, grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy, and adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace.

name: Gishki Emilia
summary: The daughter of Gishki Noellia, Gishki Emilia is one of the survivors of the first Great War. During the war on the Steelswarm, she fought alongside the rest of the Gishki against the demons.

name: Lelouch vi Britannia
summary: Student at Ashford Academy and Vice President of the student council. He lives with and cares for his younger sister, Nunnally. Truthfully, he is Lelouch vi Britannia, the eleventh prince of the Holy Britannian Empire.

name: L (Death Note)
summary: Eccentric and reclusive genius detective who is the lead investigator on the 'Kira' case, a serial killing spree caused by the mysterious use of a supernatural notebook called the Death Note.

name: Mikasa Ackerman

stats.tier: At least 9-A physically, at least 8-C with swords, 8-B possibly 8-A with Swords boosted by ODM gear higher with Thunder Spears

summary: Mikasa Ackerman is the adoptive sister of Eren Yeager. After her biological parents were murdered by human traffickers, she was rescued by Eren and lived with him and his parents, Grisha and Carla, before the fall of Wall Maria.

name: Ken Kaneki

stats.tier: At least 8-B, up to 8-A, 7-C, likely High 7-C at peak

summary: Ken Kaneki is the protagonist of Tokyo Ghoul. Formerly a human studying Japanese Literature at Kamii University and living a normal life, everything was soon changed after he had Rize Kamishiro's Kakuhou transplanted into him and became a One-Eyed Ghoul.

name: Reigen Arataka
summary: Arataka Reigen is Mob's mentor and boss. He is the self-proclaimed 'Greatest Psychic of the 21st Century' as well as owner and operator of the Spirits and Such Consultation Office.

name: Guts
summary: Main protagonist of Berserk, former raid unit leader of the Band of the Hawk. Has a complex and troubled past, driven by his desire for revenge against Griffith.

name: Itachi Uchiha
summary: Itachi Uchiha was a prodigy of Konohagakure's Uchiha clan. He became an international criminal after murdering his entire clan, sparing only his younger brother, Sasuke.

name: Makima

stats.tier: {{Varies}}; {{8-A}} physically, {{Low 7-C}} with Usage: 1,000 Years, At least {{7-C}}, possibly {{High 7-C}} with Telekinesis

summary: The enigmatic leader of Public Safety Devil Extermination Special Division 4 as well as the Chief Cabinet Secretary's Personal Devil Hunter. Her true identity is later revealed to be that of the Control Devil, the fear of control and domination embodied who seeks to utilize the Chainsaw Devil's power to create a new world eradicated of anything she considers a problem and where she could stand equal with others.

name: Future Mai (Anime)

stats.tier: 9-C, 9-B with firearms, far higher via Bulma's Parting Gift
stats.speed: Peak Human, Superhuman on her motor scooter
stats.intelligence: Expert tactician, strategist, fighter, and medic. Has extraordinary leadership skills.

summary: Future Mai is an alternate universe version of the Dragon Ball character Mai who resides within Future Trunks' timeline. She forms a resistance group to combat Goku Black and has a very close connection with her fellow comrade Trunks.

name: Kakashi Hatake

stats.tier: {{7-B}} (higher with Mangekyō Sharingan), {{7-A}} with Raikiri | At least {{6-B}}, likely far higher with Kamui Raikiri, higher with Susano'o

summary: Kakashi Hatake is the Jonin leader of Team 7 in the series Naruto. He is a shinobi of Konohagakure's Hatake clan.

name: Yuji Itadori
summary: Yuji Itadori is the main protagonist of the manga and anime series Jujutsu Kaisen. He is a high school student with exceptional physical abilities, even before becoming a jujutsu sorcerer.

name: Frieren
summary: Frieren is the primary protagonist of Frieren: Beyond Journey's End. Eighty years after defeating the demon king as a member of the hero Himmel's party, she travels the world to discover new magic while visiting places where her party traveled during their 10 year voyage to defeat the demon king, in an attempt to relive those past memories, learn more about her past comrades, and discover why such a small time period of her life could have left such a profound impact on her.

name: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End
summary: The Demon King has been defeated, and the victorious Hero Party returns home before disbanding. The four—mage Frieren, hero Himmel, priest Heiter, and warrior Eisen—reminisce about their decade-long journey as the moment to bid each other farewell arrives.

name: Rintarou Okabe
summary: Self-proclaimed mad scientist and the main protagonist of Steins;Gate.

name: Kaguya Houraisan
summary: Former princess of the Moon, banished to Earth for consuming the Hourai Elixir to become immortal. She is based on a character from a 10th-century Japanese folk-tale, 'The Tale of the Bamboo Cutter'.

name: Light Yagami

stats.intelligence: Genius Intelligence (Was stated to be the best student in all of Japan)
abilities: Social Influencing (Leadership, Deception, Charisma, Coercion, Reputation, Instilling Fear)
Death Manipulation (As long as Light knows a person's name and face, he can kill them by writing their name in the Death Note, causing a heart attack by default)
Mind Manipulation (Can control people's actions against their will before death, and cause suicide)
Fate Manipulation (Can control when and how people die within 23 days, and can cause 'accidental' deaths through seeming coincidence)
Limited Probability Manipulation (Can cause events to happen as long as it's logically possible)
Limited Disease Manipulation (Can develop any specified disease into the victim if given the right time of death for it to progress)

summary: Main protagonist of the Death Note series, a high-achieving student with a strong sense of justice who uses the Death Note to rid the world of evil by eliminating criminals.

name: Light Turner
summary: Light Turner is the main protagonist of the 2017 Netflix remake film, Death Note, which is very loosely based on the anime and manga series of the same name by Tsugumi Ohba and Takeshi Obata. He is a teenage student who finds a Death Note and decides to use it to kill criminals and appoints himself the god of a clean world.

name: Mao Mao
summary: Mao Mao is the primary protagonist and titular character of the Cartoon Network series, Mao Mao: Heroes of Pure Heart. He fights to uphold justice and one day become a legend known and beloved by all.

name: Violet Evergarden
summary: Violet Evergarden is the main protagonist of the Violet Evergarden series. She's an orphan who was adopted by Gilbert Bougainvillea and became a child soldier who exhibited extraordinary fighting capabilities.

name: Denji (Chainsaw Man)
summary: Denji is the main protagonist of the first part of the manga and anime series Chainsaw Man. He is a teenage devil hunter with the exceptional ability to transform into a devil himself.

name: Shigeo Kageyama

summary: Shigeo Kageyama, also known as Mob, is the protagonist of the manga/anime series Mob Psycho 100.

name: Alphonse Elric
summary: Younger brother of Edward Elric, Fullmetal Alchemist. Victim of the failed Human Transmutation experiment in which Ed lost his right arm and left leg.
